name: async-bulkhead-llm
description: Fail-fast admission control for LLM workloads built on async-bulkhead-ts.

scripts.build: npm run build:esm && npm run build:cjs && npm run build:types
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run lint && npm run build && npm run test:run && npm run test:coverage && npm run smoke
scripts.smoke: node --input-type=module -e "await import('./dist/esm/index.js')" && node -e "require('./dist/cjs/index.cjs')" && node --input-type=module -e "import { readFileSync } from 'node:fs'; const js = readFileSync('./dist/cjs/index.cjs', 'utf8'); const map = JSON.parse(readFileSync('./dist/cjs/index.cjs.map', 'utf8')); if (!js.includes('sourceMappingURL=index.cjs.map')) throw new Error('bad CJS sourceMappingURL'); if (map.file !== 'index.cjs') throw new Error('bad CJS sourcemap file');"
scripts.release:check: npm run lint && npm run build && npm run test:run && npm run test:coverage && npm run smoke && npm run pack:check
